subcodes.first_line: O thou pilgrim of musk-laden breath! Thy letter was received, bearing glad tidings of recovery from illness, and brought joy to my heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مشکین نفس نامه شما رسید بشارت بهبودی از علیلی بود سبب سرور قلبی گردید
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
